profile.name: Seungjun Oh
profile.tagline: Highly motivated student with a strong background in the cryptocurrency industry. I have acquired expertise in various domains (crypto-blockchain, financial engineering), complemented by practical working experience.

cv.subtitle: Web3 Researcher & Technical Writer bridging the gap between Crypto Markets and Socio-Technical Systems.

education.institution: Pohang University of Science and Technology (POSTECH)
education.degree: B.S. in Industrial & Management Engineering (Full Scholar)

highlights: Developed educational contents about Blockchain Core for company's rebranding - HR strategy
Studying blockchain core technology - had an internal seminar about Tempo blockchain
Participated in company rebranding like Tech Blog - HR Strategy reference research
Supported the execution of several Base Korea's offline meetups
Wrote Articles about Base Builders in South Korea - Building tips on Base Chain
Contracted as a Consultant after being awarded 3rd place in the 2025 IQC (Korea Final), currently inactive
Participated in the Database Operation & Management of Logistic systems for departments of the Air Force
Served as a squad leader (Aug 2024 - Dec 2024)

experience.team: Research Center, Bithumb Economy Research Institute
highlights: Participated in the macro-cryptocurrency report 'Crypto Insights' series (8 reports)
Published blockchain research report 'CRYPTO NOTES' series (2 reports)
Presented a session at the offline seminar, 'Crypto Insight meetup' (Topic: 2023 ETH Upgrade)
Assisted with the filming of the company's official YouTube content 'Bitconomy report' and 'Crypto talk'
Managed overall tasks and led decision-making for building the open community
Joined the PDAO Launch Project and assisted with general operations

research.focus: Studying Financial Data Analysis in High-Dimensional statistics and High-Frequency conditions
Studied the basics and fundamentals of Cryptocurrency and Blockchain Technology

publication.title: Digital Asset Era is Coming
publication.description: Wrote bitcoin/blockchain introduction and technology chapter.

Improved alpha performance through iterative refinement and validation
